name: chronicle
description: Write and guard your project's history — craft commits (auto simple/atomic) and author reviewer-legible PRs/MRs enriched by the cockpit decision trail.

interface.shortDescription: Craft commits and author reviewer-legible PRs/MRs.
interface.longDescription: Chronicle writes and guards your project's history: a unified commit skill that auto-decides simple vs atomic, and a PR/MR author that turns commit history plus the cockpit decision trail into a reviewer-legible request on GitHub or GitLab.
defaultPrompt: Open a PR for this branch.
